sentences.target: Je vérifie le programme du festival.

translations.fr: Je vérifie le programme du festival.
translations.es: Estoy revisando el programa del festival.
translations.de: Ich schaue mir das Festivalprogramm an.
translations.it: Sto controllando il programma del festival.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在查看节日的日程表。
translations.yue: 我喺度睇節日嘅日程表。
translations.pt: Estou conferindo a programação do festival.
translations.vi: Tôi đang xem chương trình của lễ hội.
translations.hi: मैं उत्सव के कार्यक्रम की जाँच कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: フェスティバルのプログラムを確認しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'programme'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'vérifie'.
Preposition 'de' fused with 'le' (contracted), introducing 'festival' as a genitival complement of 'programme'.
Common noun, masculine; complement of 'programme' headed by 'du'.

sentences.target: Tu peux envoyer le programme aux parents.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ɑ̃vwaje lə pʁɔɡʁam o paʁɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu peux envoyer le programme aux parents.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ɑ̃vwaje lə pʁɔɡʁam o paʁɑ̃/
translations.en: Please send the program to the parents.
translations.es: Por favor, envía el programa a los padres.
translations.de: Bitte schick das Programm an die Eltern.
translations.it: Per favore, invia il programma ai genitori.
translations.zh-Hans: 请把活动安排发给家长。
translations.yue: 請將活動安排發畀家長。
translations.pt: Por favor, envia o programa aos pais.
translations.vi: Vui lòng gửi chương trình cho phụ huynh.
translations.ar: من فضلك أرسل البرنامج إلى أولياء الأمور.
translations.nl: Stuur het programma alsjeblieft naar de ouders.
translations.hu: Kérlek, küldd el a programot a szülőknek.
translations.hi: कृपया कार्यक्रम माता-पिता को भेज दो.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, στείλε το πρόγραμμα στους γονείς.
translations.id: Tolong kirimkan programnya ke para orang tua.
translations.ja: 保護者にプログラムを送ってください。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects infinitive 'envoyer'.
Infinitive verb, complement of the modal 'peux'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'programme' (direct object of 'envoyer').
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'envoyer'.
Preposition 'à' fused with plural article 'les' (contracted), introducing 'parents' as indirect object target.
Common noun, plural; indirect object of 'envoyer'.

sentences.target: On suit le programme d’entraînement ensemble.

translations.fr: On suit le programme d’entraînement ensemble.
translations.en: We’re following the training plan together.
translations.es: Estamos siguiendo el plan de entrenamiento juntos.
translations.it: Seguiamo insieme il programma di allenamento.
translations.ko: 우리는 함께 훈련 계획을 따르고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们一起遵循训练计划。
translations.yue: 我哋一齊跟住訓練計劃。
translations.pt: Estamos seguindo o plano de treinamento juntos.
translations.he: אנחנו עוקבים יחד אחר תוכנית האימונים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cùng nhau thực hiện kế hoạch tập luyện.
translations.hi: हम साथ में प्रशिक्षण योजना का पालन कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは一緒にトレーニング計画に従っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun often used for 'we' in spoken French; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreement with 'on'); main predicate.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'programme'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'suit'.
Preposition 'de' with elision before a vowel; introduces the noun complement 'entraînement'.
Common noun, masculine; noun complement modifying 'programme' ('programme d’entraînement').
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating manner.

sentences.target: Le musée change son programme cette semaine.
sentences.reading: /lə myze ʃɑ̃ʒ sɔ̃ pʁɔɡʁam sɛt səmɛn/

translations.fr: Le musée change son programme cette semaine.
translations.ipa: /lə myze ʃɑ̃ʒ sɔ̃ pʁɔɡʁam sɛt səmɛn/
translations.en: The museum is changing its program this week.
translations.es: El museo cambia su programación esta semana.
translations.de: Das Museum ändert diese Woche sein Programm.
translations.it: Il museo cambia il suo programma questa settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 博物馆本周调整活动安排。
translations.yue: 博物館本週會調整活動安排。
translations.ru: Музей на этой неделе меняет свою программу.
translations.pt: O museu está mudando sua programação nesta semana.
translations.he: המוזיאון משנה את התוכנית שלו השבוע.
translations.vi: Bảo tàng đang thay đổi chương trình của mình trong tuần này.
translations.nl: Het museum verandert deze week zijn programma.
translations.uk: Музей цього тижня змінює свою програму.
translations.hu: A múzeum ezen a héten megváltoztatja a programját.
translations.hi: संग्रहालय इस सप्ताह अपना कार्यक्रम बदल रहा है.
translations.pl: Muzeum w tym tygodniu zmienia swój program.
translations.el: Το μουσείο αλλάζει το πρόγραμμά του αυτή την εβδομάδα.
translations.nb: Museet endrer programmet sitt denne uken.
translations.sv: Museet ändrar sitt program den här veckan.
translations.ro: Muzeul își schimbă programul săptămâna aceasta.
translations.cs: Muzeum tento týden mění svůj program.
translations.da: Museet ændrer sit program i denne uge.
translations.ja: 博物館は今週プログラムを変更しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'musée' (subject NP).
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'programme'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'change'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'semaine'.
Common noun, feminine; temporal complement indicating when the change occurs.
